---
title: "Week 8"
date: 03-24-26
description: |
  This week, we will learn about method of moments and bayesian estimators.
editor: source
draft: false
---

| Lecture   | Slides                       | Annotated  | Video     |
|-----------|------------------------------|------------|-----------|
| Monday    | [Slides](../lectures/8a.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/8a_annotated.pdf) | [Video]() |
| Wednesday | [Slides](../lectures/8b.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/8b_annotated.pdf) | [Video]() |
